ddls:
CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "txn_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "trade_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the transaction occurred */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., buy, sell, funds in) */,
  "instrument_desc" TEXT /* Description of the instrument involved in the transaction */,
  "client_internal" TEXT /* Internal client identifier associated with the transaction */,
  "instrument_currency" TEXT /* Currency of the instrument involved in the transaction */,
  "instrument_id" TEXT /* Unique ID of the instrument */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the instrument traded */,
  "price" REAL /* Price per unit of the instrument */,
  "net_money" REAL /* Net money value of the transaction */,
  "portfolio" TEXT /* Portfolio associated with the transaction */,
  "base_currency" TEXT /* Base currency for the portfolio */,
  "portfolio_manager_name" TEXT /* Name of the portfolio manager overseeing this transaction */,
  "broker" TEXT /* Broker handling the transaction */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction (e.g., pending, completed, canceled) */,
  "trade_reference" TEXT /* Reference number for the trade */,
  "fees" REAL /* Fees associated with the transaction */,
  "taxes" REAL /* Taxes associated with the transaction */,
  "execution_time" TEXT /* Time when the transaction was executed */,
  "settlement_date" TEXT /* Date when the transaction is settled */,
  "audit_trail" TEXT /* Audit trail information stored as JSON */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the transaction record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the transaction record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("txn_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_portfolio FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio") REFERENCES portfolios ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_broker FOREIGN KEY ("broker") REFERENCES brokers ("broker_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_portfolio_manager_name FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_manager_name") REFERENCES portfolio_managers ("manager_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_client_internal FOREIGN KEY ("client_internal") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolios" (
  "portfolio_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each portfolio */,
  "portfolio_name" TEXT /* Name of the portfolio */,
  "client_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the client associated with the portfolio */,
  "manager_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the manager responsible for the portfolio */,
  "base_currency" TEXT /* Base currency for the portfolio */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the portfolio was created */,
  "risk_level" TEXT /* Risk level of the portfolio */,
  "investment_strategy" TEXT /* Description of the investment strategy */,
  "performance_history" TEXT /* Historical performance data stored as JSON */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the portfolio record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the portfolio record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolios_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES portfolio_managers ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clients" (
  "client_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each client */,
  "client_name" TEXT /* Name of the client */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address for client communications */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the client */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the client registered with the firm */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the client */,
  "tax_id" TEXT /* Tax identification number */,
  "risk_tolerance" TEXT /* Client's risk tolerance level */,
  "investment_goals" TEXT /* Description of the client's investment goals */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the client record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the client record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio_managers" (
  "manager_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each portfolio manager */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Full name of the portfolio manager */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address for the manager */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the manager */,
  "date_hired" TEXT /* Date when the manager was hired */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience */,
  "qualifications" TEXT /* Description of the manager's qualifications */,
  "performance_rating" TEXT /* Performance rating of the manager */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the manager record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the manager record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instruments" (
  "instrument_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each financial instrument */,
  "instrument_name" TEXT /* Name of the financial instrument */,
  "instrument_type" TEXT /* Type of instrument (e.g., stock, bond) */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the instrument is traded */,
  "issuer" TEXT /* Issuer of the financial instrument */,
  "maturity_date" TEXT /* Maturity date for bonds or other instruments */,
  "coupon_rate" REAL /* Coupon rate for bonds */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the instrument record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the instrument record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brokers" (
  "broker_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each broker */,
  "broker_name" TEXT /* Name of the broker */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address for the broker */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number for the broker */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the broker */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the broker record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the broker record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("broker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "currencies" (
  "currency_code" TEXT /* Code of the currency (e.g., USD, GBP) */,
  "currency_name" TEXT /* Full name of the currency (e.g., United States Dollar) */,
  "exchange_rate" REAL /* Current exchange rate relative to the base currency */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Currency symbol (e.g., £, $) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the currency record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the currency record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("currency_code")
)
